title: Add cross-backend consistency test suite
description: PRD §4 and ARCH require cross-backend consistency tests — all backends must pass the same behavioral test suite. Create test/cross-backend-consistency.test.js that runs identical get/set/delete/list/scan/stat operations against all 6 backends (AgenticStore, OPFS, NodeFs, Memory, SQLite, LocalStorage) and asserts identical results. Cover: path format (/prefix), error types (NotFoundError on missing get/delete), empty path rejection, list() result format, stat() field completeness. Target: PRD §4 gap 'Cross-backend consistency tests — not found' and ARCH gap 'No cross-backend consistency tests'.
